review_title: Kyvos is a great product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With Kyvos, we could modernize our analytics stack and achieve quick responses to queries. Their Support team is always available, providing us with quick resolutions to our issues.
cons: We deploy Kyvos on Azure through VMs, it would be nice if Kyvos was more cloud native

review_title: Kyvos makes it easy to look at any amount of data without slowing down.
description: We can now go through huge sets of data quickly and create reports without long waits. It’s helped us make decisions faster.
author: shubham C.
pros: Kyvos makes it easy to look at any amount of data without slowing down. The layout is simple and our team can use it with other tools they already know. It saves time and helps us get the information we need faster.
cons: Some advanced options can be a bit confusing at first. Setting it up took some effort, but once we understood how it works, it became easier to use.

review_title: Data Analytics Engineer
description: Good overall from developer side and from management side
author: Sikkander Azarudeen A.
pros: * Easy to use * Speed on queries * Accessibility
cons: * low performance in few complicated calculation.

review_title: Helped us make sense of our data
description: Analytics used to be slow, especially with large datasets. Now, we build reports and dashboards faster. Teams like sales and finance now get current updates.
author: Ayush B.
pros: We deal with a lot of data across teams and it was hard to get accurate insights. Kyvos lets us analyze everything directly from our data lake without moving it. It’s easy to use and works with different BI tools.
cons: At first, our older systems didn’t work well with it. But once we moved to a hybrid cloud, things got better.

review_title: Speeds up our Business Intelligence work
description: All our Business Intelligence tools are supported Same data can power both Business Intelligence and Artificial Intelligence.
author: Manish S.
pros: Works with our Business Intelligence tools Connects easily with Spark and SQL databases and fulfill our needs.
cons: Took a little time to connect everything the first time. While Kyvos offers many benefits, the setup and learning curve could use some improvement.

review_title: Easy to use and fast to get started
description: We can now analyze both historical and current data quickly—something we struggled with before. Nice experience overall.
author: Shubhendu B.
pros: Kyvos made it easy for our team to start exploring data right away. Simple layout and works with familiar tools. The support team was helpful.
cons: Some advanced features could be easier to use. But Kyvos keeps improving things based on user feedback.

review_title: Make report fast
description: We used to wait forever for reports to run. Kyvos gets what I need right away, which speeds everything up.
author: akshay B.
pros: I can go through large datasets quickly. It’s fast and simple to use. Nice experience while using the product.
cons: No complaints so far.

review_title: Work fast on huge data
description: Before Kyvos, I was often stuck waiting for slow queries and managing data from different sources. Now, I can quickly find trends and patterns. It also helps my team to collaborate better since we all see the same, reliable data.
author: Neha P.
pros: Kyvos makes it easy to work with any amount of data. Complex queries run fast and everyone gets the data they need. Now, I spend less time on routine stuff and more on actual analysis
cons: As of now i like everything about kyvos. Everything is working smooth. The experience has been great.

review_title: Sifting through old data is no longer a hassle.
description: Our data was stored across different locations, which made it difficult for us to analyze. Kyvos connected
author: Ram kumar C.
pros: Kyvos makes it easy to work with years of data. The simple interface lets our team explore data on their own and getting started was smooth with great support along the way.
cons: Kyvos works great, but writing MDX queries takes some know-how, so we need someone skilled in it, which slows us down a bit.

review_title: Helped us bring all our data together in one place
description: We had data all over the place before. Kyvos helped us break down the silos, now everything’s in one place and everyone sees the same data.
author: Akshay M.
pros: I like how Kyvos connects with all kinds of BI tools that we already use and we don’t need to move data around.
cons: Some features took time to figure out at first, but once we got used to it, things have been working well.

review_title: Impressively handled large data without slowing down during demo
description: Our teams spend a lot of time exploring data to keep operations on track. As they use multiple BI tools, the reports are sometimes not consistent. I think Kyvos will be a good fit to solve this as it has the ability to give us a clear view of our complete data no matter which tool we’re using. We’re excited to see how this will help simplify things for everyone.
author: Babita B.
pros: We first learned about Kyvos at an event where their team showed us what the platform can do. The way it handles any amount of data without slowing down grabbed our attention.
cons: The setup process went smoothly and so far, there’s nothing we can say we dislike.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Customer Service
description: The Kyvos product is very well received by our users. The Kyvos team really listen to our feedback and provide solutions to what we need going forward. This is then presented to us at future upgrade demos. The Kyvos team have integrated with our in house team seamlessly and they really do go the extra mile.
author: Collette T.
pros: I have found Kyvos very intuitive as a product, however, my main experience is working with the Kyvos team whom have been brilliant throughout. We have weekly governance calls to ensure everything is covered off from a business perspective but also that any infrastructure/performance concerns can be addressed. The team are super responsive and excellent in their knowledge of not only their product but in understanding what our business needs. They work with us from the requirements gathering phase through to development, testing, performance impact analysis, UAT, implementation, Post Implementation Testing and monitoring to ensure we have an application not only up and running but working to the optimal standards at all times. As part of the ongoing monitoring, the Kyvos team often look at ways to optimize existing cubes with a desire and focus on continuous improvement. If only all vendors were as knowledgeable, helpful and reliable.
cons: There are areas such as data blending that are not in our current version but i believe these are being introduced in one of the upgrades.

review_title: A reliable partner for faster reporting
description: Kyvos makes it easy to work with large data. Our teams can now get accurate information quickly. It has made our workflows efficient and working with other teams feasible.
author: Ranganath P.
pros: Kyvos has increased our reporting speed. Reports that used to take forever now load almost instantly. The interface is easy to use. It connects with our existing BI tools, so we didn’t need to change our setup.
cons: We’d love more customization options to adapt the platform to our specific needs. The initial setup was also a bit tricky, but once done, it runs smoothly.

review_title: Fast queries and easy dashboards
description: Kyvos lets us analyze millions of records in seconds without external dependencies. It integrates well with Power BI, Tableau, Excel and XL-Cubed, so we don’t need to learn any new tools.
author: Jaiprakash S.
pros: The query performance is impressive. The drag-and-drop functionality makes it easy to build dashboards and the security settings let you control who can see what data.
cons: There’s a lot to explore, so it takes time to learn everything While Kyvos works extremely well, but writing MDX queries requires some expertise. This means we need someone with that skill set and this slows us down a little.

review_title: Reliable and adaptable data solution tool
description: Our previous tool was difficult to manage due to slow processing times and system inefficiencies. Kyvos has improved speed, simplified our workflows and provided the flexibility we need to analyze large datasets efficiently.
author: Ankur P.
pros: Kyvos meets all our needs with advanced hierarchies, seamless Excel integration, horizontal scaling and strong data security. It's easy to use and highly adaptable. The team is also very responsive, incorporating customer feedback into product updates.
cons: There isn’t a strong online user community yet. Having a dedicated space for discussions and troubleshooting would be helpful.

review_title: Fast data analysis but MDX needs expertise
description: Kyvos consolidates all our data in one place and works well with our data lake. It helps us analyze data faster, so we can track risks every day. Plus, it lets users explore data on their own.
author: Sandeep Y.
pros: Kyvos makes it easy to work with large amounts of data, whether it's old or new. The support team is also very responsive and helped us through the onboarding process.
cons: MDX queries require expertise, creating a dependency on specific team members. This can slow down changes or updates when those skills are needed.

review_title: Kyvos helps us meet our risk targets more effectively and quickly
description: •After trying a bunch of open-source tools that didn’t work for us, Kyvos has helped us get the most out of our data which we can now use to make better decisions •Kyvos also made it easier for our team to explore data on their own, without needing any technical help.
author: PRAVEENA S.
pros: •Kyvos has completely changed how we handle reporting. It makes it super easy to explore past and current data at once. •The setup was quick and easy with the help of their support team. •Kyvos pulls all our data together and allows us to explore it directly from our existing data sources. •We’ve been able to meet our risk targets more effectively, getting daily updates on various asset types.
cons: Once up and running, it’s much easier to maintain, but any updates or changes still require a bit of effort and technical management. While Kyvos offers a lot of benefits, the setup and learning curve could use some improvement.

review_title: Making analytics faster and decisions smarter
description: Kyvos made data exploration more efficient. Also, it works well with BI tools like Tableau and Power BI which makes it easier to understand data.
author: Vijay R.
pros: Kyvos made exploring any amount of data effortless by delivering quick results. The OLAP cubes returned responses almost instantly.
cons: The setup process was a bit complex, but their support team helped us through it, making things much easier.

review_title: Kyvos makes analysis of complex data easier
description: We deal with complex datasets across different hierarchies and Kyvos allows us to analyze any amount of data instantly.
author: Sachin J.
pros: Kyvos helps us analyze large datasets from different sources quickly. Due to its fast query engine we don’t have to wait long for results and we get insights quickly. The platform also works well with the tools we already use.
cons: There’s limited community support, making it harder to find quick solutions from other users. More active forums or user groups would be useful.

review_title: Kyvos Review
description: We were looking for a solution that's affordable and works well with large data. Kyvos helped us in handling our growing data needs while still being fast. It also made it easier to create visual reports, which our team prefers over the tools we used before.
author: HIJAS M.
pros: Setting it up was easy and it works well with different cloud platforms. We liked having multiple deployment options, so we could choose what fit us best.
cons: We needed some help from their PS team with configurations, but they were responsive and made sure everything worked.

review_title: Analyze years of data without hassle
description: With Kyvos, we can work with records from the past decade and run detailed analysis. This has made it easier to predict outcomes like payouts and prepare for what’s ahead.
author: SHASHANK V.
pros: Kyvos works with the tools we already use, letting us explore years of records quickly. We didn’t need to change anything in our current system and there were no unexpected costs. It can grow with our needs, whether we’re handling more data or running more queries.
cons: It can feel a little overwhelming for new users, but the training materials make learning much easier.

review_title: Faster reporting and smooth GCP migration
description: Kyvos made reporting fast for us. Now teams spend time building dashboards instead of waiting for data.
author: Arpit G.
pros: Our data was not connected across departments, which made analysis slow. Kyvos helped us analyze large data quickly and we can add more dimensions to reports without worrying about speed. It also supported our move to GCP, which was a big plus.
cons: Migrating from on-prem to GCP was tough due to our large data cubes. But with help from the Kyvos support team, we managed the shift without missing anything.

review_title: Quick and clear data analysis
description: Kyvos makes it simple to work with large data and apply filters to get accurate results quickly. Good tool for detailed data analysis.
author: Pawan K.
pros: Kyvos allowed us to process any amount of data in seconds, saving a lot of time. Its data visualization features help us break down complex information into charts and dashboards.
cons: It’s a bit hard to understand at first, but once you learn how to use it, it becomes easy. We haven’t faced any major challenges worth mentioning.

review_title: Makes our data AI-ready
author: Priyal J.
pros: Easy to connect data to AI tools Feeds clean, ready-to-use data Supports smooth AI project work Smooth working
cons: Not much to complain about Kyvos Insights. It works faster as compared to other software. Solves big data query in seconds.

review_title: Kyvos made data management simpler and more secure for our teams
description: Kyvos has helped us bring everything together in one place. It’s made data access more secure and easier to handle at all levels, which has been a big win for us.
author: Kshama G.
pros: What I really like about Kyvos is it’s taken a lot of pressure off our developers and made managing data so much easier for them. The setup was easy and the support team was great, always there when we needed help.
cons: After software or system upgrades, there’s a bit of extra work needed to validate certain setups, which can be a bit of a hassle during deployments.
